body:
defiantlybouncingonit:

Video game that plays as a visual novel with each chapter ending in combat, the number of combats is predetermined.

Every time you lose in combat, instead of dying, your character is now reprogrammed/ brainwashed to work for the faction you lost against. The story continues. The different paths are based on what factions you’ve been passed around and in what order.

The only way to finish your original goal is to play like hell and ace every combat. The game is kinda horny about how much it doesn’t want this.
